---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for kssh
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**The problem**
What are you trying to do that kssh doesn't support today?

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see. Where would it live in the UI (which section / a new route)?

**Alternatives considered**
Any workarounds you currently use, or other approaches you thought about.

**Scope check**
kssh aims to stay a small, local, no-daemon menu-bar tool. Does this fit that, or would it
need background services / network access? (Not a blocker — just helps frame the discussion.)
